title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 382.402 - Applicability of law
text:
382.402.  Applicability of law. — Sections 382.400 to 382.409 shall apply to licensed insurers either domiciled in this state or domiciled in a state that is not an accredited state having in effect laws substantially similar to the provisions of sections 382.400 to 382.409.  All provisions of this chapter, to the extent they are not superseded by sections 382.400 to 382.409, shall continue to apply to all parties within holding company systems subject to sections 382.400 to 382.409.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 8, A.L. 2009 H.B. 577)
